title: Academic Notice Demo
description: Run the live Canvas Academic Notice PoC end-to-end. Creates a demo module, generates PDFs from institutional templates, uploads files, and optionally opens a browser for recording.

course_id.title: Canvas Course ID
course_id.description: Target Canvas course ID. Uses CANVAS_COURSE_ID from credentials if not specified.

publish_module.title: Publish Demo Module
publish_module.description: Make the demo module visible to students (default: unpublished)

headed.title: Open Headed Browser
headed.description: Open a visible browser window after creation for demo/recording

keep_open.title: Keep Browser Open
keep_open.description: Keep browser open until manually closed (Ctrl+C)

verify_only.title: Verify Outputs Only
verify_only.description: Skip creation and just verify existing output files
